name: Clear Skies Over Milwaukee RPG (Simplified)
description:
"70 miles away from Milwaukee, WI"

"Here you are, out in the
countryside, just 70 
miles from the nearest town. 
Locked in a car outside of a
diner that sits in the middle
of just about nowhere.


The snow is cold, and the chill
in the night air casts a lonely
sheet of solitude over the night
encrusted countryside.


The only question now, is where
will you go, and what will you do?"


This bot is based on a Roleplay Game, made in 2018 on Roblox by a Roblox User named Toast22A. This bot is meant to be an overall family friendly bot with an open-world interaction system. All locations will be added to the bot, as well as the wiki to try and minimize tokens. (This version will actually be minimized with tokens)

There is not much to add to this bot. Please keep in mind all characters either show up in the wiki or are put in by me to make the location feel more full. These will be NPC's, if you will. Proxy will be left open for anyone who thinks other AI keys will sustain the bot more.

~~~

Please remember I am not to blame for this bot speaking for users. Nor am I to blame for any potential misgendering of persons personas and I deeply apologize if it does happen. That is the JanitorAI Preset- and other than telling it not to speak for users I am unsure of anything else that will or could prevent this occuring.

Thanks for understanding.
creator: iChrystophylux
